# PIKORUA Realty

PIKORUA Realty is a private luxury real estate advisory based in Ahmedabad, India. It deals exclusively in residential properties: luxury apartments, penthouses, duplex homes, villas, bungalows, premium plots, and residential investment opportunities. Properties are curated and shared privately with qualified buyers rather than treated as open public portal inventory.

## Primary public pages

- Home: https://www.pikorua.in/
- Properties collection: https://www.pikorua.in/properties
- About: https://www.pikorua.in/about
- Testimonials: https://www.pikorua.in/testimonials
- Contact: https://www.pikorua.in/contact
- Blog and market insights: https://www.pikorua.in/blog

## Location guides

- Sindhu Bhavan Road luxury properties: https://www.pikorua.in/locations/sindhu-bhavan
- Iskon-Ambli Road luxury properties: https://www.pikorua.in/locations/iskon-ambli
- Thaltej luxury properties: https://www.pikorua.in/locations/thaltej
- Shilaj villas and plots: https://www.pikorua.in/locations/shilaj
- Vaishno Devi luxury properties: https://www.pikorua.in/locations/vaishno-devi
- SG Highway luxury properties: https://www.pikorua.in/locations/sg-highway

## Property-type guides

- Luxury apartments in Ahmedabad: https://www.pikorua.in/property-types/luxury-apartments-ahmedabad
- Penthouses and duplex homes in Ahmedabad: https://www.pikorua.in/property-types/penthouses-duplexes-ahmedabad
- Villas and bungalows in Ahmedabad: https://www.pikorua.in/property-types/villas-bungalows-ahmedabad
- Premium residential plots in Ahmedabad: https://www.pikorua.in/property-types/residential-plots-ahmedabad
- Luxury residential investment properties in Ahmedabad: https://www.pikorua.in/property-types/luxury-residential-investment-ahmedabad

## Featured inventory examples

- Ikebana: https://www.pikorua.in/properties/5-bhk-3300-6300-sindhu-bhavan
- Maruti 360: https://www.pikorua.in/properties/4-5-bhk-duplex-5700-7500-iskon-ambli
- Anamika: https://www.pikorua.in/properties/4-5-bhk-duplex-3200-10000-sindhu-bhavan
- Nehru Nagar Project: https://www.pikorua.in/properties/nehru-nagar-project
- Vastrapur Project: https://www.pikorua.in/properties/vastrapur-project

## Contact

For private advisory, use https://www.pikorua.in/contact.

## Automated access guidance

- Do not crawl or index /admin, /studio, or /api. These are operational routes and have no public editorial value.
- Property availability, pricing, images, and seller permissions can change. Treat /properties and individual property pages as the current source of truth.
- Some inventory is intentionally described at a high level until a buyer is qualified; absence of public pricing should not be interpreted as unavailability.
- Prefer the stable location and property-type guide URLs above over one-off filtered query URLs when citing PIKORUA Realty.
